name: sage
description: v0.2.0 — End the week knowing where every decision landed and what's owed, even when five meetings all touched the same thing. It turns a stream of transcripts into one living weekly round-up of action items, cross-meeting threads, and a forward watch list. Pulls from Read.ai, Fireflies, or Granola via MCP; works on manually dropped transcripts for anything else. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace; self-contained and runs on its own.
